006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import jakarta.servlet.*;
024
025/**
026 * ServletInputStream wrapper around a normal input stream with support for limiting input.
027 *
028 */
029@SuppressWarnings({
030   "resource" // is and sis are servlet-container-managed streams passed in by the caller; closed by the container
031})
032public class BoundedServletInputStream extends ServletInputStream {
033
034   private final InputStream is;
035   private final ServletInputStream sis;
036   private long remain;
037
038   /**
039    * Wraps the specified byte array.
040    *
041    * @param b The byte contents of the stream.
042    */
043   public BoundedServletInputStream(byte[] b) {
044      this(new ByteArrayInputStream(b), Long.MAX_VALUE);
045   }
046
047   /**
048    * Wraps the specified input stream.
049    *
050    * @param is The input stream to wrap.
051    * @param max The maximum number of bytes to read from the stream.
052    */
053   public BoundedServletInputStream(InputStream is, long max) {
054      this.is = is;
055      this.sis = null;
056      this.remain = max;
057   }
058
059   /**
060    * Wraps the specified input stream.
061    *
062    * @param sis The input stream to wrap.
063    * @param max The maximum number of bytes to read from the stream.
064    */
065   public BoundedServletInputStream(ServletInputStream sis, long max) {
066      this.sis = sis;
067      this.is = sis;
068      this.remain = max;
069   }
070
071   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
072   public int available() throws IOException {
073      if (remain <= 0)
074         return 0;
075      return is.available();
076   }
077
078   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
079   public void close() throws IOException {
080      is.close();
081   }
082
083   @Override /* Overridden from ServletInputStream */
084   public boolean isFinished() { return sis != null && sis.isFinished(); }
085
086   @Override /* Overridden from ServletInputStream */
087   public boolean isReady() { return sis == null || sis.isReady(); }
088
089   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
090   public synchronized void mark(int limit) {
091      is.mark(limit);
092   }
093
094   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
095   public boolean markSupported() {
096      return is.markSupported();
097   }
098
099   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
100   public int read() throws IOException {
101      decrement();
102      return is.read();
103   }
104
105   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
106   public int read(byte[] b) throws IOException {
107      return read(b, 0, b.length);
108   }
109
110   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
111   public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len) throws IOException {
112      long numBytes = Math.min(len, remain);
113      int r = is.read(b, off, (int)numBytes);
114      if (r == -1)
115         return -1;
116      decrement(numBytes);
117      return r;
118   }
119
120   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
121   public synchronized void reset() throws IOException {
122      is.reset();
123   }
124
125   @Override /* Overridden from ServletInputStream */
126   public void setReadListener(ReadListener arg0) {
127      if (nn(sis))
128         sis.setReadListener(arg0);
129   }
130
131   @Override /* Overridden from InputStream */
132   public long skip(long n) throws IOException {
133      long toSkip = Math.min(n, remain);
134      long r = is.skip(toSkip);
135      decrement(r);
136      return r;
137   }
138
139   private void decrement() throws IOException {
140      remain--;
141      if (remain < 0)
142         throw ioex("Input limit exceeded.  See @Rest(maxInput).");
143   }
144
145   private void decrement(long count) throws IOException {
146      remain -= count;
147      if (remain < 0)
148         throw ioex("Input limit exceeded.  See @Rest(maxInput).");
149   }
150}
